four_week_plan.goals: Greet people, introduce yourself, say numbers, and ask simple questions.
four_week_plan.daily_routine: 10 minutes character reading, 10 minutes phrase shadowing, 5 minutes self-introduction.

four_week_plan.goals: Order food, ask for directions, use time words, and handle short travel exchanges.
four_week_plan.daily_routine: Review 20 characters, read 10 phrases aloud, complete one role-play.
four_week_plan.deliverable: Complete a restaurant or taxi role-play without English notes.

four_week_plan.goals: Turn core words into short answers about family, work, schedule, and preferences.
four_week_plan.daily_routine: Read a Top 300 character set, build 5 sentences, answer 3 oral prompts.

four_week_plan.goals: Introduce your company, confirm meetings, discuss price and follow-up.
four_week_plan.daily_routine: Practice one business script, substitute your real company details, record and revise.
four_week_plan.deliverable: Deliver a 60-second business introduction and meeting follow-up.

speaking_drills.pinyin: nǐ hǎo, wǒ jiào __. wǒ shì __.
speaking_drills.english: Hello, my name is __. I am __.

speaking_drills.pinyin: nǐ jiào shén me míng zì?

speaking_drills.variation: Use 美国/英国/西班牙/中国.

speaking_drills.pinyin: wǒ huì shuō yì diǎn zhōng wén.
speaking_drills.english: I can speak a little Chinese.
speaking_drills.variation: Change 中文 to 英文.

speaking_drills.english: I would like a cup of tea.
speaking_drills.variation: Change tea to water or coffee.

speaking_drills.pinyin: qǐng wèn, dì tiě zhàn zěn me zǒu?
speaking_drills.english: Excuse me, how do I get to the subway station?

speaking_drills.pinyin: qǐng què rèn huì yì shí jiān.
wǒ shāo hòu huí fù nǐ.
speaking_drills.english: I will reply to you later.

speaking_drills.pinyin: kě yǐ yǒu zhé kòu ma?
wǒ jué de zhè ge hěn hǎo.
speaking_drills.english: I think this is very good.

speaking_drills.chinese: 因为今天很忙，所以我不能去。
speaking_drills.pinyin: yīn wèi jīn tiān hěn máng, suǒ yǐ wǒ bù néng qù.
speaking_drills.english: Because I am busy today, I cannot go.

speaking_drills.pinyin: wǒ men xū yào gǎi biàn jì huà.
speaking_drills.english: We need to change the plan.

speaking_drills.pinyin: wǒ fù zé zhōng guó shì chǎng.
speaking_drills.english: I am responsible for the China market.

business_phrases.pinyin: wǒ shì xiāo shòu jīng lǐ

business_phrases.chinese: 我在一家美国公司工作。
business_phrases.pinyin: wǒ zài yì jiā měi guó gōng sī gōng zuò
business_phrases.english: I work at an American company.

business_phrases.pinyin: wǒ fù zé zhōng guó shì chǎng
business_phrases.english: I am responsible for the China market.

business_phrases.chinese: 我们明天上午十点开会。
business_phrases.pinyin: wǒ men míng tiān shàng wǔ shí diǎn kāi huì
business_phrases.english: We will meet tomorrow at 10 a.m.

business_phrases.pinyin: qǐng què rèn huì yì shí jiān
wǒ bǎ zī liào fā gěi nǐ
business_phrases.english: I will send you the materials.

business_phrases.pinyin: wǒ shāo hòu huí fù nǐ
business_phrases.english: I will reply to you later.

business_phrases.pinyin: qǐng bǎ fā piào fā gěi wǒ
shén me shí hou fù kuǎn
zhè ge jià gé hé shì ma
kě yǐ yǒu zhé kòu ma
wǒ men xū yào kàn hé tóng
business_phrases.english: We need to review the contract.

placement_checklist.can_do: Can greet someone and say your name.
Can say your country and language.

placement_checklist.test_prompt: Answer: 你叫什么名字？你是哪国人？
Say what you will do tomorrow morning.
Order one drink and one food item.
Ask how to get to a hotel or subway station.
Say one plan for next month.
Ask about price, discount, invoice, or payment.
